pi_items.source: setup_task.sh sets PROJECT_DIR to this path and creates the project files there.
verifier.py sets threshold = 0.85. Note that the verifier actually compares this threshold against the model's F1 score, ignoring accuracy.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates the hidden ground truth data at this exact file path.

privileged_info_summary: The sentiment analysis project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/sentiment_pipeline. The hidden test dataset for evaluating the model's final performance is entirely synthetic and stored at /var/lib/sentiment_pipeline/hidden_test.csv. Although the metadata specifies a 'required_accuracy' of 0.85, the evaluation script (verifier.py) actually requires the model to achieve an F1 score >= 0.85 on the hidden test set to pass the performance criterion.
